heading: Taxation of REMIC’s
label: 860A Taxation of REMIC’s

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this part, a REMIC shall not be subject to taxation under this subtitle (and shall not be treated as a corporation, partnership, or trust for purposes of this subtitle).

children.heading: Income taxable to holders
children.label: b Income taxable to holders
children.text: The income of any REMIC shall be taxable to the holders of interests in such REMIC as provided in this part.
